underlying_goal: User wanted to recall nvim dashboard shortcut, then fix LSP navigation to view struct definitions/fields without switching files
friction_detail: Claude initially stalled searching for notes, and the hoverKind gopls setting didn't actually show struct fields as promised—required a second attempt with a peek plugin.
brief_summary: User wanted to navigate to and preview struct definitions in nvim; after some false starts with LSP settings, Claude remapped gD to type_definition and installed a peek-definition plugin.
